name: Dino T Rex 3D Run
description: Just enjoy the remake of the popular offline and endless game, that you know from the Google Chrome browser in a new 3D dimension! In the Dino T-Rex 3D Run, you can find cool features like: 3D Dino T-Rex 3D obstacles alternating day and night increasing speed black and white mode or color mode 3D or 2D mode playful music funny sounds cool effects during the run simple controls ----- Please note, that the first version of the game was released 12.7.2019 for the other platforms.
instructions: Up Arrow - jump Down Arrrow - duck or use UI buttons
